title: Sgovenar
compiled_truth: Sgovenar is an external contact at [Govadv](companies/govadv). Over the corpus period (2000-02-05 to 2001-12-20), Sgovenar sent 202 and received 903 emails, totalling 1105 interactions. Top correspondents: [Paul Kaufman](people/paul-kaufman) (152), [Harry Kingerski](people/harry-kingerski) (143), [Jdasovic](people/jdasovic) (142), [Smara](people/smara) (129), [Leslie Lawner](people/leslie-lawner) (126).
